title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, a factory-building game that requires strategic planning and resource management. The model builds and optimizes an automated factory without human intervention.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 playing Factorio, a factory-building game centered on strategic planning and resource management. The model builds and optimizes an automated factory autonomously, without human intervention. The demonstration matters as a test of long-horizon planning and agentic behavior, since Factorio requires sustained decision-making across many interdependent steps.
